sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52516" key="kalamobo/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλᾰμο-βόας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n52516.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">noisy with the pen</tr_>, nickname of Antipater, who dared not argue <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">viva voce</tr_> with Carneades, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.514d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
